logistics.format: Three-part exam (Part 1: 125 questions / 150 min; Part 2: 100 questions / 120 min; Part 3: 100 questions / 120 min). Multiple-choice, Pearson VUE

formal: Bachelor's degree (or 2 years of internal audit experience required if no degree, depending on pathway)

recommended_certs.rationale: CIA は内部監査全般、CISA は IT 監査特化。両方を併用する監査人は多い。

plus.note: IIA established 1941; CIA is the only globally accepted internal-audit credential.

minus.note: Internal audit profession is broader than cybersecurity; security is one chapter.

evaluation.rationale: All three personas agree at this tier; rationale reflects consensus.
